stemHtml: What types of atmospheric features are identifiable through infrared satellite imagery, and which part of the infrared spectrum is predominantly employed for this purpose?

options.a: Detects cloud composition only; short-wave IR only
options.b: Detects clouds and turbulence; short-wave IR only
options.c: Detects clouds, storm systems, and frontal structures; long-wave IR
options.d: Detects jet streams directly; short- and long-wave IR
